headings.text: ​ Not sure which API to use?
Give your coding agent a browser built for them.

localDocsLinks.text: Stagehand Recommended for AI-native workflows JavaScript and Python support Self-healing page automations LLM-powered browser control AI-first architecture
Playwright Recommended for traditional automation JavaScript, Python, Java, and C# support Static workflow definitions Robust testing capabilities Extensive API support
Puppeteer Recommended for Puppeteer users JavaScript support Static workflow definitions Robust testing capabilities Extensive API support
Selenium Recommended for Selenium users JS, Python, Java, C#, and Ruby support Static workflow definitions Robust testing capabilities Extensive API support
Functions Recommended for serverless workflows Zero infrastructure management API-invocable browser agents Built-in session management Perfect for webhooks and scheduled tasks
Give your coding agent a browser built for them. Paste this into your agent to get started: Read https://browserbase.com/SKILL.md to set up Browserbase
Skills Give your AI coding agent a browser in one prompt Next
Fetch API Retrieve page content as clean markdown through a proxy network.
Search API Fast, token-efficient web search results for your agents.
Model Gateway Route requests across 100+ LLM providers with a single endpoint.
Agents Power AI agents with real browser interactions and tool use.
Browser automation Automate logins, registrations, and multi-step form flows.
Web data retrieval Extract structured data from any website at scale.
Automated testing Run reliable end-to-end tests in isolated browser environments.
SDKs reference Stagehand and Browserbase SDKs, plus a full REST API reference.
Playwright Full browser control with auto-waits, network interception, and multi-tab support.
Skills and prompts You’re an agent? Start here!
Functions Deploy and run browser agents on Browserbase, on a schedule or on demand.
Puppeteer Direct Chrome DevTools Protocol access for fine-grained browser control.
Selenium Battle-tested cross-browser automation via the WebDriver standard.
Stagehand The SDK for browser agents. Natural language selectors, self-healing actions, and caching at scale. 22k GitHub stars, 700k+ weekly downloads. Built by Browserbase.
Mastra TypeScript-first agent framework with built-in Browserbase support.
LangChain Composable LLM chains and agents with browser tools.
CrewAI Multi-agent orchestration with collaborative browser tasks.
